CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2007 Assigned To Arbitration On Jan-07-08

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-08-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Denise Duucette
Robert Kane, Esq. for Plaintiff: Ahdi Nashashibi, as Trustee of The Nashashibi Family Trust.
Plaintiff's Witness: Ahdi Nashashibi, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering of the filed declaration, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Uemura Co., Frank Kaoru Uemura, and Marokakis Remodeling as follows:
Damages $23,475.00
Prejudgment Interest to be calculated.
Costs $776.00
Counsel to prepare Proposed Judgment.

Nov. 8, 2007
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
